function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-03-16
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-16                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-normalizing the Oskar Novak–related bill in 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_16__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md and then deleting the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, verified Oskar via canonical entity file, applied finance OCR schema while preserving the original note body, and deleted the inbox file after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file requested OCR for bills related to Oskar Novak. Canonical identity was verified in 10_entities/cast/oskar.md. A search in 50_finance found one matching bill note, and its visible content provided all required bill fields and line items. That note was updated with YAML frontmatter according to 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, preserving the original body, which satisfies the OCR workflow.
